name: Schema.org Injector
description: Generate Schema.org structured data (JSON-LD) for company profiles — Organization, Product, FAQPage — for SEO rich snippets.
usage_notes: Enable all three schema types for maximum rich snippet coverage. Disable Product if the entity is not product-focused. FAQPage maps directly to Google's FAQ rich snippet format.

options.name: generate_organization
options.label: Generate Organization schema
options.description: Generate Schema.org Organization markup from entity data (name, URL, logo, description, founding date, employees, address, social links).

options.name: generate_products
options.label: Generate Product schemas
options.description: Generate Schema.org Product markup for each primary product/service category found in the entity data.

options.name: generate_faq
options.label: Generate FAQPage schema
options.description: Generate Schema.org FAQPage markup from FAQ items. Maps directly to Google's FAQ rich snippet format.

options.name: company_url_field
options.label: Company URL field
options.description: Which entity field contains the company URL. Used for the Organization url property.
